properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v2 v3 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Sing to the Lord with all your heart, Come, sing your praises to Him Jesus my God, here by my side, We're gonna celebrate with Him.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Dwelling in the presence of God, In the power of Your Name, Lord I know I'll find my way with You.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: /: All of my days, I want to praise Jesus my Lord and say Lord I believe You'll come and stay Here in my heart today. :/ All of my days, I want to praise.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: In my life I feel so right, Praising the Name of the Lord, Lord be my guide in all my life, I feel so safe within Your love.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: All of my days, I want to praise.
